title: sedum telephium var. repens
intro: Sedum telephium var. repens, also known as Burdock or Wood Betony, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sedum family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Sedum telephium var. repens is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
